The '''ro'ik chuun m'arh''' was a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] analog used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] as a picket and long-range reconnaissance ship.

==Characteristics==
A flexible vessel that fulfilled a number of roles in a conflict, the ro'ik chuun m'arh frigate was an important part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warfleet. Created from living [[yorik coral]], the ro'ik chuun m'arh was the equivalent of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|escort frigate]] or an Imperial [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]].

The fully-grown ship could reach 440 meters in length, significantly larger than the enemy equivalents,<ref name="NJOS" /> but most documented vessels of this type were significantly smaller. The ''[[Gift of Anguish]]'' was around 200 meters long, and [[Nom Anor]]'s personal ship [[Trickster|''Ksstarr'']] was around 150 meters.<ref name="SbS" /> The eight frigates that fought in the fleet of [[Supreme Commander]] [[Komm Karsh]] in the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]] were also around this size.<ref name="DW">''[[Destiny's Way]]''</ref>

A fully-grown ro'ik chuun m'arh had a crew of 225 and 370 passengers. Smaller ships could be operated by minimal flight crew of less than a dozen pilots and gunners,<ref name="DW" /> but could still deploy three full [[Scourge (unit)|companies]] of [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong infantry]].<ref name="SbS" /> A 440-meter ro'ik chuun m'arh frigate was typically armed with thirty [[Yaret-Kor|yaret-kors]], and also featured the standard [[dovin basal]]s - used to propel the craft, to shield the vessel, to and strip enemy defenses in the combat.<ref name="NJOS" /> Even the relatively small ''Ksstarr'' was very heavily armed, with weapons batteries on the bows and flanks, each combining yaret-kor plasma cannons and [[magma missile]] launchers.<ref name="SbS" /><ref name="DW" /> This particular frigate, at least, could fire every weapon it carried at targets directly ahead of the ship, and in a surprise attack its full salvo was capable of inflicting decisive damage to far larger opponents.<ref name="DW" />

The ro'ik chuun m'arh frigate was adaptable during combat, able to take on various missions. In battle, it could serve as an assault vessel, or an escort for larger ships, or provide battle support to wounded vessels. Away from the front line, the type was capable of serving as a long-range reconnaissance ship, a courier for high-ranking individuals, a cargo transport, troop carrier, or patrol picket. They often carried boarding skiffs, each capable of carrying one hundred warriors, either to the surface of a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] or to board another [[Starship/Legends|starship]].<ref name="SbS" />

Despite its firepower and versatility, the ro'ik chuun m'arh could not use its dovin basals to generate an effective [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]] - though it often allowed larger ships to do this, while concentrating on destroying enemy forces.
